channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ousted senator has no regrets about voting to convict Trump
item.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy said his 2021 vote to convict President Trump on a House impeachment charge of inciting the Jan. 6 riots at the U.S. Capitol may have...

item.title: The Real 'Flight 93' Election
item.description: The stakes in 2028 could indeed be existential.

item.title: Instead of Taxing the Rich, Let Americans Invest Like Them
item.description: When ordinary workers seek the same investment opportunities as the wealthy, Washington suddenly finds reasons to object.

item.title: Stop Trump's Slush-Fund Boondoggle
item.description: A new plan to compensate victims of Biden lawfare risks abuse and cronyism.
